modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to install Curve Capture on Windows 10/11.

full_description_text: The user was trying to install Curve Capture on their Windows 10 or 11 computer. They said that the sensors are not showing up when they try to capture an image in Curve Hero. It seems like something is not working right, and they need help with the installation process. They mentioned they were following the steps but still facing issues.
short_description: Unable to install Curve Capture on Windows 10/11.
